component.name: Cheat Engine for Linux
component.summary: Memory scanner, debugger, and injector for modding games and apps

description.p: A Linux-native reimplementation of Cheat Engine in C++ and Qt6: memory scanning, pointer scanning, an auto-assembler, an interactive multi-thread debugger, structure dissection, cheat tables, and Lua scripting.
Focused on single-player game modding and reverse engineering. It does not target multiplayer anti-cheat.
AOB-injection fix, 32-bit/WoW64/Wine support, cheat-table inline editing.
